title: Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Lucknow-based team.

About Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions:
Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail Ventures Solutions!
